final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output reg [3:0] Z
);always @(*) begin
        if((A+B) > 9) begin
            Z = (A+B) % 10;
        end
        else begin
            Z = A+B;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Z = A; if (B == 4'b0) begin Z = B; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Z = A; if (B == 4'b0) begin Z = B; end
